response.justification: The candidate lacks the mandatory 5–10 years of professional C++ development experience on Windows, with no demonstrated work history involving C++ in capital markets or fixed-income systems. While the resume highlights diverse technical skills (JavaScript, Python, D, etc.), none align with the core C++ and Windows platform requirements for this role. Domain expertise in investment banking or capital markets is also absent.
strengths: Strong problem-solving and software craftsmanship skills demonstrated across multiple domains
Experience with high-performance systems (e.g., low-latency apps, custom web servers)
Proven ability to learn and adapt to new languages and frameworks quickly
concerns: No C++ development experience on Windows platform (core requirement)
Lacks domain expertise in capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income
Minimal or no experience with SQL Server/Oracle, STL, or messaging frameworks
